title: Osakajo, Osaka, 2025
creator: Henry
subject: Osakajo (Osaka, Japan); Castles; Architecture
description: We went to Osaka Castle with Mom's older sister and her kids and walked around the grounds. Tickets to get inside were 1,200 Yen per person and the line was so long, so we didn't end up going in.

title: Dragonfly, Okinawa, 2025
creator: Henry
subject: Dragonflies; Animals
description: A red dragonfly perched atop a rock at Fukushuen Garden, a Chinese garden. We went to the gardens with Mom's younger sister and her kids. Entry fee to the garden was 200 Yen per person (100 Yen for the kids).

title: Daibutsuden, Nara, 2023
creator: Mei
subject: Daibutsuden (Todaiji, Nara-shi, Japan); Architecture; Buddhist Temples
description: Todaiji Daibutsuden, or the Great Buddha Hall in Nara. Admission was 800 Yen per person to enter the Hall.

title: Doraemon Buns at Universal, Osaka, 2025
creator: Mei
subject: Food; Amusement parks
description: Two Doraemon themed meat sauce and cheese buns in their original wrappings from Universal Studios Japan. We went with Mom's older sister and her kids.

title: Deer, Nara, 2025
creator: Henry
subject: Deer; Animals
description: One deer looking away, a deer and her baby deer in the background walking in Nara. Biscuits to feed the deer were available for about 200 Yen, but we did not get any.

title: Pancakes at Square Enix Cafe, Tokyo, 2023
creator: Mei
subject: Pancakes, waffles, etc.; Food
description: We went to Square Enix Cafe in Shinjuku and got various pancake plates for breakfast. We spent about 1,200 to 1,500 Yen per plate.

title: Ocean View from Ryugujo Observatory, Miyako, 2025
creator: Henry
subject: Ocean; Nature
description: Mom's older sister took us to Ryugujo Observatory. There was no entry fee.

title: Pastries, Tokyo, 2025
creator: Mei
subject: Pastry; Food
description: While waiting for our TeamLabs Borderless entry time, Henry and I got pastries at a patisserie in the Azubudai Hills tower.

title: Pooh's Hunny Hunt at Tokyo DisneyLand, Chiba, 2025
creator: Mei
subject: Amusement rides; Amusement parks; Tokyo Disneyland (Urayasu-shi, Japan)
description: Part of the line to the Pooh's Hunny Hunt ride at Tokyo DisneyLand. Went with my brother and Henry.

title: City Line from Kiyomizu-dera, Kyoto, 2025
creator: Mei
subject: Cityscape photography; Nature
description: Cityline view from the Kiyomizu-dera temple in Kyoto. There was a 500 Yen entrance fee, as well as an additional 100 Yen to do the "Womb Tour".

title: Toriike Pond, Miyako, 2023
creator: Mei
subject: Ponds; Nature
description: One of the two Toriike Ponds formed by limestone erosion. No entry fee. Mom's older sister drove us.

title: Dango, Tokyo, 2023
creator: Mei
subject: Mochi; Food; Street food
description: Various flavors of dango purchased at a street food vendor at the Nakamise Shopping Street by Sensoji Temple in Asakusa. We went with Mom's brother and his wife.

title: Flower Exhibit at teamLab Planets, Tokyo, 2023
creator: Mei
subject: Art museums; Museum exhibits; Flowers
description: The final flower exhibit at the teamLabs Planets museum. Tickets were 3,800 Yen per person. This is from the first time I went with the study abroad group, but I went again later with Mom, my brother, Mom's brother and his wife.

title: Phoenix Hall, Kyoto, 2023
creator: Mei
subject: Architecture; Buddhist Temples
description: Phoenix Hall at Byodo-In in Uji, Kyoto. Admission to the interior of the hall is 300 Yen per person.

title: Kinkaku-ji Temple, Kyoto, 2023
creator: Mei
subject: Architecture; Buddhist Temples
description: The Kinkaku-ji Temple, or the Golden Pavilion, in Kyoto, surrounded by a pond. Entrance fee was 500 Yen per person. It is considered a World Heritage Site.
